title: Path to Proving a Metric Space is Connected
description: A flowchart demonstrating the method of using a continuous function and the Intermediate Value Theorem to prove a metric space is connected.
elements: Start: Prove Metric Space (X, d) is connected
Assume a continuous function f: X -> {0,1} exists
Alternative Path: Find a separation (U, V)
relationships: Flow from 'Start' to 'Assume a continuous function...'
If 'Show f is constant' is successful, flow to 'Conclude X is connected'
If 'Show f is constant' fails, flow to 'Alternative Path: Find a separation (U, V)'
If separation is found, flow to 'Conclude X is disconnected'
